channel.title: Gollek Blog
channel.description: Gollek release notes, architecture updates, and developer guides.

item.title: Gollek ML SDK: Bringing PyTorch-like DX to the Java Ecosystem
item.description: Gollek ML SDK: Bringing PyTorch-like DX to the Java Ecosystem

item.title: One API, Any Model: The Gollek SDK and CLI Experience
item.description: Exploring how the Gollek SDK and CLI provide a unified interface for GGUF, SafeTensors, and Cloud AI, making high-performance inference accessible to every Java developer.

item.title: Why Java for AI? The Engineering Behind Gollek's High-Performance Engine
item.description: Exploring why Gollek chooses Java over Python, leveraging LibTorch, llama.cpp, and the latest Project Panama and Valhalla features in JDK 25.

item.title: Unleashing the Distributed Inference Fabric: Cluster-Wide LLM Execution
item.description: Unleashing the Distributed Inference Fabric: Cluster-Wide LLM Execution

item.title: Audio Module v2.0 and Quantization Engine Release
item.description: Audio Module v2.0 and Quantization Engine Release

item.title: How Gollek GGUF Chat Loads from Hugging Face and Answers
item.description: Step-by-step walkthrough of what happens when running gollek chat with a GGUF provider and a Hugging Face model reference.

item.title: Multi-LoRA and LibTorch Advanced Path Update
item.description: Gollek runtime update covering Multi-LoRA benchmark tooling, FP8 rowwise calibration lifecycle, and safe SageAttention2 experimental gating.

item.title: Introducing the New Gollek Inference Engine
item.description: Release introduction to the new Gollek inference engine, key advantages, and community contribution paths.
